reviews.comment:
Hace falta un surtidor de Eurodiesel junto al de diesel comun para no tener que hacer la cola con los que cargan nafta.

(Translated by Google)
We need a Eurodiesel pump next to the regular diesel pump so we don't have to wait in line with those filling up with gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNTg3MXJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Lástima la demanda que se genera ante rumores que hace que se formen largas colas. Si todos hacemos uso responsable, podremos disponer siempre del servicio de carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's a shame the demand generated by rumors leads to long lines. If we all use our services responsibly, we'll always have access to the fueling service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OFlDNTNnRRAB
